questions: what to do if a snake bites
how to treat snake bite at home
shap katley ki hospital jete hobe
snake bite hole ki korte hoy
answers: If bitten by a snake, stay calm and keep the bitten limb below heart level. Remove jewelry near the bite, clean with soap and water, and get to the hospital immediately for antivenom.
Shap kamrale prothome calm thakun. Bite er jaygata heart er niche rakhun, tight kapor ba jewelry khule felun, ar jotoshighroi hospital e jan. Bish chushte try korben na.
Snake bite first aid: Don't cut the wound or try to suck venom. Keep still, remove tight items, bandage above the bite loosely, and rush to the nearest hospital for antivenom treatment.
Shap katley tourniquet ba bish choshar cheshta korben na — eta myth. Wound ta clean korun, movement kom rakhun, ar hospital e jan. Possible hole shaper photo tulen jate doctor identify korte pare.
